name: Crunchy Barley Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy, medium saucepan, bring the broth and water to a boil.
2. Add the barley. When boiling resumes, reduce heat to low, cover pan, and simmer until barley is tender (check after 30 minutes; add more water if needed).
3. While barley cooks, whisk together dressing ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Remove garlic from dressing and add barley while still hot. Toss well to combine.
5. Cover mixture and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
6. Before serving, add green pepper, carrot, onion, radishes, dill, and parsley. Toss salad well.
